stories.title: Ayala, sobre el incidente final del España-Argentina: "Estoy arrepentido, si veo a Dani Olmo le pediré disculpas en persona"
stories.summary: La actitud de los argentinos tras quedar subcampeones del mundo no fue la más deportiva posible. Leandro Paredes fue el más señalado por un agarrón en el cuello a Eric García, pero más tarde se viralizó un puñetazo de un miembro del cuerpo técnico de la Albiceleste a Dani Olmo. Ese era Roberto Fabián Ayala, el que fue jugador del Valencia CF. Con la frialdad del paso de los días, se muestra arrepentido de su comportamiento y asegura que, si ve a Dani Olomo, le pedirá disculpas «en persona». «Obviamente que estoy arrepentido. Por el lugar que yo ocupo no puedo permitirme que un sentimiento, o lo que pueda llegar a recibir de la otra parte, cambie mi humor y mis actos.

stories.title: Depositata la sentenza della Corte costituzionale nel caso Almasri: il Ministro della giustizia deve immediatamente trasmettere al Procuratore Generale presso la Corte d’appello di Roma le richieste di cooperazione della Corte Penale internazionale
stories.summary: Corte costituzionale, 23 luglio 2026, sentenza n. 143 Presidente Amoroso, Relatore Pitruzzella Come avevamo anticipato , la Corte di Appello di Roma aveva sollevato questione di legittimità costituzionale degli artt. 2, 4, 11 e 13 della Legge 20 dicembre 2012, n. 237 (Norme per l’adeguamento alle disposizioni dello statuto istitutivo della Corte penale internazionale), nella parte in cui non prevedono che il Procuratore generale debba formulare le sue richieste e la Corte di appello di Roma debba deliberare sulle stesse anche a seguito di diretta trasmissione delle medesime richieste di cooperazione della Corte. Con la sentenza n.

stories.title: Love Island: All Stars winners Molly Smith and Tom Clare marry
stories.summary: Sharing more from their marriage ceremony, Molly posted a photo to her Instagram story of her hand on top of Tom's. The snap showed their wedding rings along with a bouquet of flowers, with the caption: "Husband and wife". The couple first got together two years ago, when they met on season one of Love Island: All Stars. All Stars is a spin-off of the hit dating show, which sees past contestants return for a second chance at finding love in the villa. During the reality dating show, the pair beat Molly's ex-boyfriend Callum Jones and his partner at the time, Jessica Gale, who finished as runners-up.

stories.title: Best FPL Team Names 2026/27: 100 Funny Fantasy Premier League Puns
stories.summary: Fantasy Football Fix 23 July 2026 Top 100 Best FPL Team Names: Football Player Name Puns for the 2026/27 Season Gone are the days of calling your Fantasy Premier League team “Tom’s XI” or “Sheila’s Superstars.” In FPL, your team name is part of the fun — and the best FPL team names usually come with a clever footballer pun. Whether you’re a seasoned manager or setting up your first Fantasy Premier League squad, choosing a funny FPL name is your first chance to make an impression. So why settle for something boring when you can make your mini-league rivals laugh, groan, or roll their eyes with a perfectly timed player name pun?

stories.title: Fahrzeit ist Arbeitszeit: Urteil könnte Millionen Beschäftigten bis zu 400 Euro mehr im Monat bringen
stories.summary: Startseite Verbraucher Stand: 23.07.2026, 14:39 Uhr Kommentare Uns auf Google folgen Vom Treffpunkt im Firmenwagen zu Einsatzorten. Für viele Beschäftigte ist das Alltag. Oft wird die Fahrzeit nicht bezahlt. Ein Urteil könnte das nun ändern. Luxemburg – Für Beschäftigte im Handwerk, in der Pflege oder im Garten- und Landschaftsbau ist es vielerorts Routine: morgens am Betriebshof oder Sammelpunkt einsteigen, gemeinsam im Firmenfahrzeug zum Einsatzort fahren, am Abend wieder zurück. Vergütet wird in der Praxis häufig aber nur die Zeit am Einsatzort.

stories.title: Fallait-il interdire le Tour de France à Paul Seixas ? La mise en place d'une limitation d'âge à 21 ans nécessaire d'après Warren Barguil
stories.summary: Et si le cas Paul Seixas était l'arbre qui cachait la forêt ? À seulement dix-neuf ans, le jeune Français réalise une performance exemplaire pour son tout premier Tour de France. Grande révélation du cyclisme mondial en 2026, sa réussite précoce émerveille les observateurs. Pourtant, au-delà de ses réussites sportives, des voix s'élèvent quant à la place des jeunes dans les courses du World Tour. Lien interne vers l'article n°13478990 Warren Barguil, le coureur français de 34 ans, qui a remporté le maillot à pois du Tour de France en 2017, émet un doute quant aux capacités des jeunes de tenir la pression psychologique et s'interroge globalement sur leur santé mentale.

stories.title: Natation (France Open été) : le Royannais Paul Rambaud termine sur une bonne note
stories.summary: Pourtant, comme les abonnements, ils permettent de soutenir le travail des 250 journalistes de notre rédaction qui s'engagent à vous proposer chaque jour une information de qualité, fiable et complète. En acceptant les cookies, vous pourrez accéder aux contenus et fonctionnalités gratuites que propose notre site. À tout moment, vous pouvez modifier vos choix via le bouton “cookies” en bas de page.

stories.title: Tour de France: Pogacar, Merckx oder ein Anderer? GOAT-Debatte spaltet Experten: "Das wird Pogacar nie schaffen"
stories.summary: Tadej Pogacar oder Eddy Merckx: Wer ist der Radsport-GOAT? Quelle: Eurosport Pele, Maradona, Cristiano Ronaldo oder Lionel Messi? Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant oder LeBron James? Novak Djokovic, Rafael Nadal oder Roger Federer? Die Frage, wer in seiner Sportart der Allergrößte der Geschichte ist, löste in der Vergangenheit immer wieder mitunter hitzige Debatten aus. Auch im Radsport erfreut sich die Diskussion großer Beliebtheit, auch im Radsport scheiden sich die Geister - Tadej Pogacar oder Eddy Merckx? Oder vielleicht ein ganz Anderer? Die Eurosport-Experten Jens Voigt und Karsten Migels haben eine klare Meinung, Robert Bengsch wiegelt hingegen ab.

stories.title: Sozialstaat: Sozialausgaben steigen auf knapp ein Drittel der Wirtschaftsleistung
stories.summary: Die deutschen Sozialausgaben sind im vergangenen Jahr auf fast ein Drittel der gesamten Wirtschaftsleistung angestiegen. Der Anteil der Sozialleistungen stieg im Vergleich zum Vorjahr um 0,7 Prozentpunkte und damit auf 32 Prozent des Bruttoinlandprodukts (BIP), wie aus einem Bericht des Bundessozialministeriums zum Sozialbudget 2025 hervorgeht. Zuerst berichtete die Süddeutsche Zeitung . Der Bundesregierung zufolge wuchsen die Ausgaben in allen Sozialversicherungssystemen. Bei der gesetzlichen Krankenversicherung erhöhten sie sich demnach um 7,7 Prozent, bei der Pflegeversicherung um 11,2 Prozent und bei der Rentenversicherung um 5,8 Prozent.

stories.title: Actress Jaime Winstone is the eighth celebrity announced for Strictly Come Dancing 2026
stories.summary: I am so excited to announce that I will be joining the Strictly Come Dancing cast this year. I am no stranger to a dance floor, but the ballroom is a whole new world for me. I love a challenge though, so can’t wait to enter my showgirl era and get super sparkly!! Let’s get physical – see you on the dance floor! Strictly Come Dancing 2026 is coming! The hotly anticipated new series will light up Saturday and Sunday nights this autumn on BBC One and BBC iPlayer, with blockbuster actress Jaime Winstone joining the celebrity cast of 2026. The news was announced on Thursday 23 July via @bbcstrictly’s official social channels on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook and YouTube.

stories.title: V. Paret-Peintre : "Le maillot à pois est l'objectif n°1 depuis ce hiver"
stories.summary: Tour de France Tour de France 2026 | Étape 18 | Valentin Paret-Peintre (Soudal Quick-Step): "Le maillot à pois est l'objectif n°1 depuis ce hiver" Avant le départ de l'étape 18 du Tour de France, jeudi, Valentin Paret-Peintre (Soudal Quick-Step) parle de ce maillot à pois qu'il porte à la place de Tadej Pogacar, leader du classement de la montagne, mais qu'il espère lui ravir. Les chaines Eurosport sont disponibles sur la plateforme de streaming HBO Max, au sein des offres Canal+, Prime Video, Bouygues Telecom, Free, Orange et SFR.

stories.title: Affaire Balogun : la Norvège va porter plainte auprès de la Fifa pour l’ingérence de Donald Trump, qui a annulé un carton rouge
stories.summary: La Fédération norvégienne de football va porter plainte auprès de la commission d’éthique de la Fifa pour l’ingérence du président américain Donald Trump dans l’annulation du carton rouge de l’attaquant de l’équipe américaine Folarin Balogun. Lise Klaveness, la présidente de la fédération norvégienne, a détaillé le dépôt de cette plainte dans un entretien au Times , au cours duquel elle met en garde les tentatives de passer cette affaire «sous le tapis». «Lorsque l’on contourne une règle de la sorte, on s’engage sur une pente glissante qui met en péril l’ensemble de la discipline», a-t-elle déclaré au Times.

stories.title: Reabierta al baño a la playa de Punta Xinxó, cerrada hace una semana por un vertido
stories.summary: El Ayuntamiento de Sant Josep ha reabierto este miércoles la playa de Punta Xinxó al baño tras completarse las obras de emergencia para reparar la incidencia detectada en el colector de saneamiento y confirmar que la calidad del agua es apta. El Consistorio ha explicado que, mediante análisis, se ha confirmado que el agua cumple los parámetros establecidos para el baño. La playa se cerró de manera preventiva el pasado 15 de julio por un vertido provocado por la rotura de un tramo del colector de saneamiento. El Ayuntamiento, además, ha encargado la redacción del Plan de alcantarillado del municipio que incluirá una actuación integral sobre la red de saneamiento de Cala de Bou.

stories.title: Politieagent: 'Het was een vluggertje', OM spreekt van verkrachting
stories.summary: De politieagent uit Roermond die beschuldigd wordt van verkrachting, ontkent maandag in de rechtbank. Hij zegt wel dat er seks is geweest, maar volgens de 36-jarige agent was dat vrijwillig. Daar denkt het Openbaar Ministerie (OM) anders over. Daarom zou de man 2,5 jaar de cel in moeten gaan. Op 23 juni 2025 is er beachparty in Roermond, genaamd Splash. Een festival. Er wordt gedronken en er worden drugs gebruikt. Daarna is er een afterparty bij iemand thuis. Meerdere mannen en vrouwen zijn daarbij. Op de slaapkamer komt het dan tot seks tussen een man en een vrouw. Afterparty Deze man is een politieagent (*), op dat moment in burger. De 28-jarige vrouw is de bewoonster van het huis.

stories.title: 'FC Barcelona komt eruit met Ter Stegen, weg naar Ajax ligt weer open'
stories.summary: Er zit schot in de zaak wat betreft de afwikkeling van het contract van Marc-André ter Stegen bij FC Barcelona. De Catalanen hebben de doelman een tegenvoorstel gedaan om de 'fiscale geschillen' op te lossen, zodat een transfer naar Ajax gerealiseerd kan worden, meldt Mundo Deportivo . Al weken zit Ajax in de wachtkamer, want Ter Stegen is nog altijd speler van Barcelona. Bekend is dat vanuit Amsterdam niet begrepen wordt waarom er zoveel vertraging op de lijn is. Ajax begint donderdagavond tegen FK Vojvodina officieel aan het nieuwe seizoen en had Ter Stegen al lang binnen willen hebben.

stories.title: Red Eléctrica vuelve a pedir un parón a la industria
stories.summary: La situación se ha dado de nuevo. Red Eléctrica ha informado que en la noche de este miércoles, concretamente a las 22:18 horas, el operador del sistema procedió a la activación del servicio de respuesta activa de la demanda, previsto en el PO. 7.5. La activación duró hasta las 24:00 horas. Es decir, hizo uso de la herramienta denominada Servicio de Respuesta Activa de la Demanda (SRAD) que permite solicitar a los grandes consumidores, que voluntariamente participan en este servicio remunerado, que paren su actividad para estabilizar oferta y demanda de energía en el sistema en un momento de desvío de las previsiones de generación eólica.

stories.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
stories.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi does not believe Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation following the World Cup final. Argentina players Paredes, Nahuel Molina and Thiago Almada plus assistant coach Roberto Ayala all appeared to be involved in the fracas on the pitch as Spain celebrated their 1-0 win. Paredes seemed to push Spain's Eric Garcia by the throat and unused substitute Gavi tried to intervene but was forced to the ground by Almada. Paredes pushed the Barcelona midfielder to the turf by putting his hand in the Spaniard's face.

stories.title: « Quand ça ne va pas, il faut changer » : arrivée de Cléopatre Darleux, d’un directeur général… Pourquoi l’organisation du Brest Bretagne Handball évolue
stories.summary: LFH. Brest BHUn premier titre de championnes de France depuis 2021 et une qualification pour le dernier carré (Final Four) de la Ligue des champions, là aussi une première en cinq ans. Sportivement, la saison 2025-2026 du Brest Bretagne Handball a été réussie. En interne, elle a été agitée par plusieurs tempêtes, dont la crise interne qui a abouti au départ des entraîneuses Raphaëlle Tervel et Sandrine Mariot un an avant la fin de leur contrat. « On a vécu une année pas facile au niveau du staff, estime Gérard Le Saint. Quand ça ne va pas, il faut changer.

stories.title: Virus Toscana a Morrovalle: accertato un caso. Il Comune invita alla prevenzione
stories.summary: Un caso accertato di infezione da virus Toscana nel territorio di Morrovalle, il Comune, per limitare la proliferazione dei pappataci, invita la cittadinanza a osservare delle buone pratiche. A segnalare il caso al Comune è stata l’Azienda sanitaria territoriale di Macerata. I l virus Toscana può essere trasmesso dalla puntura dei pappataci, piccoli insetti ematofagi attivi soprattutto nelle ore crepuscolari e notturne durante i mesi caldi e, in una piccola parte delle persone infette, può causare malattie gravi come meningiti e meningo-encefaliti.

stories.title: Kerry football captain Paul Geaney: ‘I don’t think I’d be here if the rules didn’t change’
stories.summary: M ost things get easier when you’re preparing for your eighth All-Ireland final, and for Kerry captain Paul Geaney that includes knowing how to switch off from football completely. Having three young kids at home helps in that regard. At the close of his 16th season with Kerry, Geaney’s All-Ireland final experience began with the 2014 win over Donegal and included the 2019 replay defeat to Dublin. Victory over Mayo on Sunday would bring his fourth winner’s medal in all, having also won a first All-Ireland club title with Dingle at the start of this year. “I probably got overexcited in the earlier years with big games,” Geaney says of this week’s final countdown.

stories.title: Minister will meet Law Society over legal aid dispute
stories.summary: Minister for Justice Jim O'Callaghan has said he will meet the Law Society to discuss the dispute over the new legal aid payments system, which has led to widespread disruption in criminal courts. Mr O'Callaghan rejected suggestions that he had been intransigent on the issue and said the first request he got for a meeting from the Law Society since the system was introduced was last night. Speaking on RTÉ's Morning Ireland, the minister said he had no difficulty meeting the Law Society and was sure there were "some areas in terms of where they can make points to me that I will accept and engage with them".

stories.title: Sadie Sink Keeps Mystery Of 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' Role & Reveals "I Am Not Aunt May"
stories.summary: Sadie Sink ‘s role in Spider-Man : Brand New Day remains a mystery ahead of the film’s premiere. A new video teased Sink revealing three things about her character in the Sony Pictures production, but left audiences with the same doubts. “Since the trailer dropped, I’ve seen so many theories about who I’m playing,” Sink said in the Instagram clip. “To match your incredible energy, I’ve decided to give you three exclusive, confirmed answers right now.” Starting off the video, Sink said, “I can confirm I am not Spider-Man.” She continued to joke and said, “I am not Aunt May,” the character that Marisa Tomei played and died in 2021’s Spider-Man: No Way Home .

stories.title: Una casta que se juzga a sí misma
stories.summary: El Consejo General del Poder Judicial archivará las cinco denuncias contra el juez Juan Carlos Peinado, instructor del caso Begoña Gómez, tras la propuesta de Ricardo Conde. El órgano judicial pospuso la decisión final por falta de consenso interno. La polémica surgió por un auto de Peinado que retiró el pasaporte a Begoña Gómez y sugirió que sus escoltas podrían facilitar una fuga.

stories.title: US House passes $1.15 trillion military bill expanding Israel cooperation
stories.summary: The U.S. House narrowly passed a $1.15 trillion military spending bill on Wednesday by a 216-212 vote, expanding military technology cooperation with Israel. Six Democrats joined Republicans in support while seven Republicans opposed it. The measure now faces uncertain prospects in the Senate.
stories.trend: us house national defense authorization act

stories.title: Trambestuurder na botsing uit het ziekenhuis: 'Hij was in shock, dat is niet het beste moment iemand te spreken'
stories.summary: De RET heeft nog steeds geen idee wat de oorzaak is van de trambotsing van woensdag. De twee zwaar beschadigde trams zijn naar een remise gesleept en worden grondig onderzocht. De bestuurder van de tram die de botsing veroorzaakte, is inmiddels weer thuis. De RET hoopt hem vandaag of morgen te spreken. De twee trams zijn woensdag aan het begin van de avond van de Erasmusbrug weggehaald. "Ze staan in de remise en ze worden helemaal uit elkaar gehaald", zegt RET-directeur Linda Boot bij Peter & Milou op Radio Rijnmond.

stories.title: Karine Ferri maman : elle partage une rare et adorable photo de sa petite dernière, Sasha, 3 ans, qui a bien grandi
stories.summary: Karine Ferri shared a rare photo of her 3-year-old daughter Sasha on Instagram on July 23, showing the toddler in a superhero mask. The image captures Sasha in a playful moment with her family in Brittany. Ferri, known for her TV work, often highlights her family life online.

stories.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling are joined by her teenage daughter, Georgina, to support Prince William at a charity polo day
stories.summary: From their first meeting to their wedding day, family has been at the heart of Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling's royal romance. So it is of no surprise their three daughters continue to play such an important part in their lives now that they're married. Last week, Harriet and Peter were joined by her daughter, Georgina, as they made a low-key appearance at the DMMI Royal Charity Polo Cup at Guards Polo Club, Windsor.

stories.title: Burnham acting like he's still mayor, says Badenoch
stories.summary: The Tory leader says the new prime minister needs to "lift his sights" to fix broader issues with the UK. Kemi Badenoch has accused Andy Burnham of governing like he is still the mayor of Greater Manchester, with a "spending spree" of early promises. The Conservative leader said the new prime minister had failed to explain how a series of measures announced during his first days in office could be paid for. Burnham's early policies include restoring a £2 cap on bus fares in England and cutting VAT on household electricity bills. Labour defended his announcements, adding he was "bringing back hope after Kemi Badenoch's Tory Party nearly broke Britain".

stories.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
stories.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords. Figure caption, Watch: What we know about the US-Saudi nuclear deal By Robert Greenall Updated 19 minutes ago The landmark nuclear deal between the US and Saudi Arabia is dependent on Riyadh joining the Abraham Accords recognising the State of Israel, President Donald Trump has said. "The Civil Nuclear Deal (There will be no enrichment of material!)... which pertains only to non-military use... will be approved, but is totally subject to Saudi Arabia joining the very respected and successful Abraham Accords," Trump said in a post on Truth Social.

stories.title: Ford picks Apple Maps for its next EV platform and updated BlueCruise
stories.summary: Ford will embed Apple Maps into its new Universal Electric Vehicle Platform starting with a $30,000 midsize pickup truck launching in 2027. The integration will provide real-time traffic, natural language directions, and intelligent EV routing without requiring an iPhone. Ford also announced a next-generation BlueCruise system using Apple Maps data for hands-free highway driving.

stories.title: Arsenal sign Greek forward Tzolis for £34m
stories.summary: Arsenal sign "extremely versatile attacking player" Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m. Arsenal have signed "extremely versatile attacking player" Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m. The 24-year-old Greece international has joined the Premier League champions on what they describe as a "long-term contract". Tzolis scored 43 goals and provided 45 assists in 108 appearances for Club Brugge. He joins Arsenal after the departure of Belgium forward Leandro Trossard to Besiktas earlier this month "Christos naturally operates on the left but is comfortable across the front line," said Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: Long-term exposure to road traffic noise is associated with a higher risk of Parkinson’s disease, the biggest study of its kind has found. Parkinson’s disease is a progressive disorder in which parts of the brain become damaged over time, affecting movement and balance. Existing research has found potential biological pathways that link noise exposure to Parkinson’s disease, largely due to stress responses and disrupted sleep. The researchers modelled noise exposure at the most and least exposed exterior of the residence of each participant and calculated the difference in noise levels.

stories.title: Trump's nuclear deal with Saudis jettisons longstanding US demands
stories.summary: Signing a nuclear pact in the Middle East is a bold move that has drawn criticism in the US and in Israel. Image source, EPA By Daniel Bush Washington Updated 54 minutes ago The Trump administration's nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia reversed a years-long stance toward a key Middle East ally. Past US presidents insisted that Saudi Arabia normalise relations with Israel in exchange for receiving American nuclear technology for civilian energy programmes.

stories.title: Inquiry into Farage poster row at anti-racism show
stories.summary: Investigation has begun after row started over posters that displayed Nigel Farage's face. An investigation has been launched after claims Reform UK councillors attempted to have a music event shut down due to posters featuring the face of party leader Nigel Farage. Police and Wakefield Council confirmed they were examining reports of an incident at the Love Music Hate Racism event at Wakefield Exchange (WX) on Saturday. Organisers said they were told by two councillors to "remove any posters and banners that named Farage or the event would be stopped".

stories.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
stories.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region. About 12,000 people have been evacuated from the south-west of France and authorities are moving 8,800 others as wildfires spread in the Gironde region. The fire brigade says about 3,100 hectares (7,660 acres) of land have already been destroyed around the Bay of Arcachon. Many of those who had to leave the area overnight were visitors to local campsites on the Lège-Cap-Ferret peninsula and the latest evacuations also involved campsites as a precaution. Wildfires have also broken out in Spain and Italy in recent days.

stories.title: Amazon gaming boss predicts future where players no longer need consoles
stories.summary: Jeff Gattis said the rising cost of gaming tech is likely to mean more people will stream their games online. Amazon's head of gaming Jeff Gattis has told the BBC he believes the rising cost of tech means people will turn to streaming games online rather than buying new consoles. He said the tech has developed a lot in recent years, making it more viable than it used to be - but accepted some people will still buy their own hardware. While cloud gaming has long been billed as the future of video games, previous efforts have failed to gain widespread adoption - leading to the high-profile closure of Google Stadia in 2023.

stories.title: Actress Jaime Winstone joins Strictly line-up
stories.summary: Winstone, known for EasteEnders and Made in Dagenham, is the eighth celebrity to be confirmed. Actress Jaime Winstone, known for roles in Made in Dagenham and EastEnders, has joined the line-up for Strictly Come Dancing 2026. She is the eighth celebrity to be confirmed for this year's series, joining stars including Delta Goodrem, Lacey Turner and Dani Dyer. Winstone, who won acclaim for her portrayal of Barbara Windsor in the BBC biopic Babs, said she was "so excited" to be joining the dance competition. The actress said in a statement she was "no stranger to a dance floor", but added that ballroom is "a whole new world for me".

stories.title: Biennale Chief Slams EU for Withdrawing Funding Over Russia’s Presence at Art Exhibition During Film Festival Press Conference: ‘They Are Abandoning Us’
stories.summary: Venice Biennale chairman Pietrangelo Buttafuoco slammed the European Union at the film festival press conference on Thursday for withdrawing a €2 million ($2.3 million) grant in response to Russia’s participation in the Biennale’s arts exhibition this year. It was the first time the country has returned to the event since the invasion of Ukraine in 2022. In an impassioned speech ahead of the announcement of the Venice Film Festival lineup, Buttafuoco said he would not bow to EU pressure since this would undermine “the autonomy and freedom of expression” of the arts foundation that operates across six artistic sectors: art, architecture, cinema, dance, music and theater.

stories.title: Codina on why she joined West Ham project
stories.summary: Laia Codina won trophies and found a "new family" during her three-year spell at Arsenal - but she was ready for a change with West Ham. Spain defender Codina said the decision to join West Ham was down to "many reasons" but the influence of Italian boss Guarino, who joined in December, was the biggest. "I remember having my first conversation with Rita. It was at the beginning of everything. I had my agent next to me and I was like 'wow'," said Codina. "The feeling that I got in this meeting is what I want in my future; it is what I want for my next steps. This was probably the main reason. "She was honest with me on everything - what she wants from me and what she wants from the team.

stories.title: Iran war updates: US says new strikes under way; Trump threatens bridges
stories.summary: US strikes on Iran are underway as of July 22, 2026, with Jordan intercepting multiple Iranian missiles targeting Gulf infrastructure. President Trump warned Iran of further strikes on bridges if attacks continue. The Pentagon confirmed expanded operations amid rising regional tensions.

stories.title: Australia open to playing Test against England in India
stories.summary: Cricket Australia is open to playing a Test match against England in India to boost interest in the format. The sides are set to meet in a one-off Test at Melbourne Cricket Ground in March 2027 for the Ashes’ 150th anniversary. Any such fixture would require agreement from the ECB and BCCI.

stories.title: Help for electricity bills as crude oil nears $100
stories.summary: The States of Guernsey said it would give Alderney Electricity £200,000 to offset islanders' bills. Jeannie Cameron, who chairs the committee, said the funds would be applied directly to customers' bills. She said: "The recent rise in global oil prices has the potential to place additional financial pressure on households and businesses at a time when many are already managing increased costs. "This temporary measure provides a level of protection against exceptional fuel price increases while ensuring that public funds are only used where they are genuinely needed." Cameron said unlike its sister islands Guernsey and Jersey, Alderney did not have cable supplying electricity from France.

stories.title: OKDIARIO localiza a Alba, la otra hija imputada de Zapatero, tras la confesión de ‘Julito’ Martínez
stories.summary: OKDIARIO ha localizado este miércoles a Alba Zapatero Espinosa, la hija menor de José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero, al día siguiente de que 'Julito' Martínez, el presunto testaferro de su padre, confesara ante el juez Calama, en la Audiencia Nacional, haber estado pagándoles sin trabajar durante tres años como parte de la comisión al expresidente por el rescate de Plus Ultra.

stories.title: FPL is live: Pick your 2026/27 squad NOW
stories.summary: Fantasy Premier League is LIVE, with managers now able to see how much every single player will cost and create their squad for the 2026/27 season. Pick your squad NOW For FPL managers who are returning to Fantasy Premier League , there is now be an option to get help when picking your initial squad through the website. While experienced managers can choose to skip this process and select their squad as normal, less-experienced managers and beginners can answer a few quick questions that will shape a squad that is chosen for them, based on their preferences. For more information, click below, and you can also watch our "ULTIMATE Beginner’s Guide to FPL" to help you get started.

stories.title: 13:16 Lockheed-Auträge klettern auf Rekordwert
stories.summary: 15:36 Uhr Lagarde erteilt Spekulationen über vorzeitigen Rückzug eine klare Absage. EZB-Präsidentin Christine Lagarde wird die Europäische Zentralbank (EZB) nach eigenen Worten nicht vor 2027 verlassen. "Sie werden mich nicht vor 2027 von hinten sehen", sagte sie in der Pressekonferenz nach der aktuellen Ratssitzung auf die Frage einer Reporterin, ob sie die EZB vor dem Ende ihrer Amtszeit verlassen werde. Lagardes Amtszeit endet Ende Oktober 2027. Zugleich sagte die EZB-Präsidentin, dass sie sich nicht gerne in eine Ecke drängen lasse und "der Kapitän nicht das Schiff verlässt, so lange Wolken am Horizont sind".

stories.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
stories.summary: Sonam Wangchuk has been the main draw at the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) protest in Delhi. The violence has stirred public anger and galvanised India's opposition, posing a challenge for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. Modi has not commented directly on the protests or engaged with the protesters, but on Thursday, he posted a statement on X that is being seen as an attempt to reach out to students who have been frustrated with repeated exam paper leaks . "Nothing is more important than the welfare and future of our youth," he wrote. "We have decided to set up fast-track courts to ensure swift and stringent punishment for those involved in paper leaks...

stories.title: Le Confederazioni artigiane al Ministro Urso: in Dpcm Automotive mini-contratti di sviluppo siano accessibili alle piccole imprese
stories.summary: Comunicati stampa 23 Luglio 2026 · AUTOMOTIVE Confartigianato Meccanica e Subfornitura, CNA Meccanica e Casartigiani Meccanica e Impianti hanno scritto al ministro delle Imprese e del Made in Italy, Adolfo Urso, in merito all’attuazione del DPCM Automotive. Le tre Confederazioni valutano positivamente lo stanziamento di 1,35 miliardi di euro per il periodo 2026-2030 e la destinazione del 70% delle risorse al sostegno della filiera, ma chiedono che i Mini-contratti di sviluppo siano realmente accessibili alle micro e piccole imprese.

stories.title: Illegal waste investigation sees £275k forfeited
stories.summary: The investigation spans Herefordshire, Worcestershire and Shropshire, police say. Three businesses that are being investigated by police who are looking into illegal waste activity have forfeited a total of more than £275,000. West Mercia Police said additional crimes had been identified in its investigation across Herefordshire, Worcestershire and Shropshire. The force added that more assets were under review and a money laundering investigation was still active. It comes after two men were arrested at an address in Drakes Broughton, Worcestershire, in January. Six firearms were seized at that location, along with about £18,000 in cash.

stories.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
stories.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

stories.title: ‘Why do I feel crappy?’: women are learning about their luteal phases - and Maha is weaponizing it
stories.summary: E mily Rae Detrick, a health coach, wants women to be more in touch with their menstrual cycle in its entirety. This, she said on an October episode of Culture Apothecary with Alex Clark, a podcast popular among “Make America Healthy Again” (Maha) adherents, is “a way that you honor God and the way we were created”. It also serves her self-assigned mission to help “make America fertile again”. In the episode and on social media, Detrick speaks at length about the luteal phase, the 14-ish days between ovulation and menstruation when women are more likely to experience irritability, bloating and food cravings.

stories.title: Diesel Crisis Puts Poor Farmers Around the World at Risk
stories.summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has limited the shipment of diesel, depriving farmers of fuel for irrigation pumps and threatening the food supply.

stories.title: Why I Sought Out a Taliban Commander I Had Fought
stories.summary: First as a Marine and then as a journalist, I spent years tied to Afghanistan. I returned one last time to speak to a former enemy in search of answers, and perhaps closure.

stories.title: Should Travelers Give Up on Summer in Western Europe Because of the Heat?
stories.summary: A favorite vacation option may be at risk because of rising temperatures. Even those sticking with their summer plans agree: More air conditioning would help.

stories.title: How to Use ChatGPT and Gemini Prompts to Find Out What They Know About You
stories.summary: It can be unsettling what Gemini and ChatGPT have figured out about you and how easily your privacy can be punctured. Here’s how to find out.

offbeat.title: Ayala, sobre el incidente final del España-Argentina: "Estoy arrepentido, si veo a Dani Olmo le pediré disculpas en persona"
offbeat.summary: La actitud de los argentinos tras quedar subcampeones del mundo no fue la más deportiva posible. Leandro Paredes fue el más señalado por un agarrón en el cuello a Eric García, pero más tarde se viralizó un puñetazo de un miembro del cuerpo técnico de la Albiceleste a Dani Olmo. Ese era Roberto Fabián Ayala, el que fue jugador del Valencia CF. Con la frialdad del paso de los días, se muestra arrepentido de su comportamiento y asegura que, si ve a Dani Olomo, le pedirá disculpas «en persona». «Obviamente que estoy arrepentido. Por el lugar que yo ocupo no puedo permitirme que un sentimiento, o lo que pueda llegar a recibir de la otra parte, cambie mi humor y mis actos.

offbeat.title: Depositata la sentenza della Corte costituzionale nel caso Almasri: il Ministro della giustizia deve immediatamente trasmettere al Procuratore Generale presso la Corte d’appello di Roma le richieste di cooperazione della Corte Penale internazionale
offbeat.summary: Corte costituzionale, 23 luglio 2026, sentenza n. 143 Presidente Amoroso, Relatore Pitruzzella Come avevamo anticipato , la Corte di Appello di Roma aveva sollevato questione di legittimità costituzionale degli artt. 2, 4, 11 e 13 della Legge 20 dicembre 2012, n. 237 (Norme per l’adeguamento alle disposizioni dello statuto istitutivo della Corte penale internazionale), nella parte in cui non prevedono che il Procuratore generale debba formulare le sue richieste e la Corte di appello di Roma debba deliberare sulle stesse anche a seguito di diretta trasmissione delle medesime richieste di cooperazione della Corte. Con la sentenza n.

offbeat.title: Love Island: All Stars winners Molly Smith and Tom Clare marry
offbeat.summary: Sharing more from their marriage ceremony, Molly posted a photo to her Instagram story of her hand on top of Tom's. The snap showed their wedding rings along with a bouquet of flowers, with the caption: "Husband and wife". The couple first got together two years ago, when they met on season one of Love Island: All Stars. All Stars is a spin-off of the hit dating show, which sees past contestants return for a second chance at finding love in the villa. During the reality dating show, the pair beat Molly's ex-boyfriend Callum Jones and his partner at the time, Jessica Gale, who finished as runners-up.

offbeat.title: Best FPL Team Names 2026/27: 100 Funny Fantasy Premier League Puns
offbeat.summary: Fantasy Football Fix 23 July 2026 Top 100 Best FPL Team Names: Football Player Name Puns for the 2026/27 Season Gone are the days of calling your Fantasy Premier League team “Tom’s XI” or “Sheila’s Superstars.” In FPL, your team name is part of the fun — and the best FPL team names usually come with a clever footballer pun. Whether you’re a seasoned manager or setting up your first Fantasy Premier League squad, choosing a funny FPL name is your first chance to make an impression. So why settle for something boring when you can make your mini-league rivals laugh, groan, or roll their eyes with a perfectly timed player name pun?

offbeat.title: Fahrzeit ist Arbeitszeit: Urteil könnte Millionen Beschäftigten bis zu 400 Euro mehr im Monat bringen
offbeat.summary: Startseite Verbraucher Stand: 23.07.2026, 14:39 Uhr Kommentare Uns auf Google folgen Vom Treffpunkt im Firmenwagen zu Einsatzorten. Für viele Beschäftigte ist das Alltag. Oft wird die Fahrzeit nicht bezahlt. Ein Urteil könnte das nun ändern. Luxemburg – Für Beschäftigte im Handwerk, in der Pflege oder im Garten- und Landschaftsbau ist es vielerorts Routine: morgens am Betriebshof oder Sammelpunkt einsteigen, gemeinsam im Firmenfahrzeug zum Einsatzort fahren, am Abend wieder zurück. Vergütet wird in der Praxis häufig aber nur die Zeit am Einsatzort.

offbeat.title: Fallait-il interdire le Tour de France à Paul Seixas ? La mise en place d'une limitation d'âge à 21 ans nécessaire d'après Warren Barguil
offbeat.summary: Et si le cas Paul Seixas était l'arbre qui cachait la forêt ? À seulement dix-neuf ans, le jeune Français réalise une performance exemplaire pour son tout premier Tour de France. Grande révélation du cyclisme mondial en 2026, sa réussite précoce émerveille les observateurs. Pourtant, au-delà de ses réussites sportives, des voix s'élèvent quant à la place des jeunes dans les courses du World Tour. Lien interne vers l'article n°13478990 Warren Barguil, le coureur français de 34 ans, qui a remporté le maillot à pois du Tour de France en 2017, émet un doute quant aux capacités des jeunes de tenir la pression psychologique et s'interroge globalement sur leur santé mentale.

offbeat.title: Natation (France Open été) : le Royannais Paul Rambaud termine sur une bonne note
offbeat.summary: Pourtant, comme les abonnements, ils permettent de soutenir le travail des 250 journalistes de notre rédaction qui s'engagent à vous proposer chaque jour une information de qualité, fiable et complète. En acceptant les cookies, vous pourrez accéder aux contenus et fonctionnalités gratuites que propose notre site. À tout moment, vous pouvez modifier vos choix via le bouton “cookies” en bas de page.

offbeat.title: Tour de France: Pogacar, Merckx oder ein Anderer? GOAT-Debatte spaltet Experten: "Das wird Pogacar nie schaffen"
offbeat.summary: Tadej Pogacar oder Eddy Merckx: Wer ist der Radsport-GOAT? Quelle: Eurosport Pele, Maradona, Cristiano Ronaldo oder Lionel Messi? Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant oder LeBron James? Novak Djokovic, Rafael Nadal oder Roger Federer? Die Frage, wer in seiner Sportart der Allergrößte der Geschichte ist, löste in der Vergangenheit immer wieder mitunter hitzige Debatten aus. Auch im Radsport erfreut sich die Diskussion großer Beliebtheit, auch im Radsport scheiden sich die Geister - Tadej Pogacar oder Eddy Merckx? Oder vielleicht ein ganz Anderer? Die Eurosport-Experten Jens Voigt und Karsten Migels haben eine klare Meinung, Robert Bengsch wiegelt hingegen ab.

offbeat.title: Sozialstaat: Sozialausgaben steigen auf knapp ein Drittel der Wirtschaftsleistung
offbeat.summary: Die deutschen Sozialausgaben sind im vergangenen Jahr auf fast ein Drittel der gesamten Wirtschaftsleistung angestiegen. Der Anteil der Sozialleistungen stieg im Vergleich zum Vorjahr um 0,7 Prozentpunkte und damit auf 32 Prozent des Bruttoinlandprodukts (BIP), wie aus einem Bericht des Bundessozialministeriums zum Sozialbudget 2025 hervorgeht. Zuerst berichtete die Süddeutsche Zeitung . Der Bundesregierung zufolge wuchsen die Ausgaben in allen Sozialversicherungssystemen. Bei der gesetzlichen Krankenversicherung erhöhten sie sich demnach um 7,7 Prozent, bei der Pflegeversicherung um 11,2 Prozent und bei der Rentenversicherung um 5,8 Prozent.

offbeat.title: Actress Jaime Winstone is the eighth celebrity announced for Strictly Come Dancing 2026
offbeat.summary: I am so excited to announce that I will be joining the Strictly Come Dancing cast this year. I am no stranger to a dance floor, but the ballroom is a whole new world for me. I love a challenge though, so can’t wait to enter my showgirl era and get super sparkly!! Let’s get physical – see you on the dance floor! Strictly Come Dancing 2026 is coming! The hotly anticipated new series will light up Saturday and Sunday nights this autumn on BBC One and BBC iPlayer, with blockbuster actress Jaime Winstone joining the celebrity cast of 2026. The news was announced on Thursday 23 July via @bbcstrictly’s official social channels on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook and YouTube.

offbeat.title: V. Paret-Peintre : "Le maillot à pois est l'objectif n°1 depuis ce hiver"
offbeat.summary: Tour de France Tour de France 2026 | Étape 18 | Valentin Paret-Peintre (Soudal Quick-Step): "Le maillot à pois est l'objectif n°1 depuis ce hiver" Avant le départ de l'étape 18 du Tour de France, jeudi, Valentin Paret-Peintre (Soudal Quick-Step) parle de ce maillot à pois qu'il porte à la place de Tadej Pogacar, leader du classement de la montagne, mais qu'il espère lui ravir. Les chaines Eurosport sont disponibles sur la plateforme de streaming HBO Max, au sein des offres Canal+, Prime Video, Bouygues Telecom, Free, Orange et SFR.

offbeat.title: Affaire Balogun : la Norvège va porter plainte auprès de la Fifa pour l’ingérence de Donald Trump, qui a annulé un carton rouge
offbeat.summary: La Fédération norvégienne de football va porter plainte auprès de la commission d’éthique de la Fifa pour l’ingérence du président américain Donald Trump dans l’annulation du carton rouge de l’attaquant de l’équipe américaine Folarin Balogun. Lise Klaveness, la présidente de la fédération norvégienne, a détaillé le dépôt de cette plainte dans un entretien au Times , au cours duquel elle met en garde les tentatives de passer cette affaire «sous le tapis». «Lorsque l’on contourne une règle de la sorte, on s’engage sur une pente glissante qui met en péril l’ensemble de la discipline», a-t-elle déclaré au Times.

offbeat.title: Reabierta al baño a la playa de Punta Xinxó, cerrada hace una semana por un vertido
offbeat.summary: El Ayuntamiento de Sant Josep ha reabierto este miércoles la playa de Punta Xinxó al baño tras completarse las obras de emergencia para reparar la incidencia detectada en el colector de saneamiento y confirmar que la calidad del agua es apta. El Consistorio ha explicado que, mediante análisis, se ha confirmado que el agua cumple los parámetros establecidos para el baño. La playa se cerró de manera preventiva el pasado 15 de julio por un vertido provocado por la rotura de un tramo del colector de saneamiento. El Ayuntamiento, además, ha encargado la redacción del Plan de alcantarillado del municipio que incluirá una actuación integral sobre la red de saneamiento de Cala de Bou.

offbeat.title: Politieagent: 'Het was een vluggertje', OM spreekt van verkrachting
offbeat.summary: De politieagent uit Roermond die beschuldigd wordt van verkrachting, ontkent maandag in de rechtbank. Hij zegt wel dat er seks is geweest, maar volgens de 36-jarige agent was dat vrijwillig. Daar denkt het Openbaar Ministerie (OM) anders over. Daarom zou de man 2,5 jaar de cel in moeten gaan. Op 23 juni 2025 is er beachparty in Roermond, genaamd Splash. Een festival. Er wordt gedronken en er worden drugs gebruikt. Daarna is er een afterparty bij iemand thuis. Meerdere mannen en vrouwen zijn daarbij. Op de slaapkamer komt het dan tot seks tussen een man en een vrouw. Afterparty Deze man is een politieagent (*), op dat moment in burger. De 28-jarige vrouw is de bewoonster van het huis.

offbeat.title: 'FC Barcelona komt eruit met Ter Stegen, weg naar Ajax ligt weer open'
offbeat.summary: Er zit schot in de zaak wat betreft de afwikkeling van het contract van Marc-André ter Stegen bij FC Barcelona. De Catalanen hebben de doelman een tegenvoorstel gedaan om de 'fiscale geschillen' op te lossen, zodat een transfer naar Ajax gerealiseerd kan worden, meldt Mundo Deportivo . Al weken zit Ajax in de wachtkamer, want Ter Stegen is nog altijd speler van Barcelona. Bekend is dat vanuit Amsterdam niet begrepen wordt waarom er zoveel vertraging op de lijn is. Ajax begint donderdagavond tegen FK Vojvodina officieel aan het nieuwe seizoen en had Ter Stegen al lang binnen willen hebben.

offbeat.title: Red Eléctrica vuelve a pedir un parón a la industria
offbeat.summary: La situación se ha dado de nuevo. Red Eléctrica ha informado que en la noche de este miércoles, concretamente a las 22:18 horas, el operador del sistema procedió a la activación del servicio de respuesta activa de la demanda, previsto en el PO. 7.5. La activación duró hasta las 24:00 horas. Es decir, hizo uso de la herramienta denominada Servicio de Respuesta Activa de la Demanda (SRAD) que permite solicitar a los grandes consumidores, que voluntariamente participan en este servicio remunerado, que paren su actividad para estabilizar oferta y demanda de energía en el sistema en un momento de desvío de las previsiones de generación eólica.

offbeat.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
offbeat.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi does not believe Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation following the World Cup final. Argentina players Paredes, Nahuel Molina and Thiago Almada plus assistant coach Roberto Ayala all appeared to be involved in the fracas on the pitch as Spain celebrated their 1-0 win. Paredes seemed to push Spain's Eric Garcia by the throat and unused substitute Gavi tried to intervene but was forced to the ground by Almada. Paredes pushed the Barcelona midfielder to the turf by putting his hand in the Spaniard's face.

offbeat.title: « Quand ça ne va pas, il faut changer » : arrivée de Cléopatre Darleux, d’un directeur général… Pourquoi l’organisation du Brest Bretagne Handball évolue
offbeat.summary: LFH. Brest BHUn premier titre de championnes de France depuis 2021 et une qualification pour le dernier carré (Final Four) de la Ligue des champions, là aussi une première en cinq ans. Sportivement, la saison 2025-2026 du Brest Bretagne Handball a été réussie. En interne, elle a été agitée par plusieurs tempêtes, dont la crise interne qui a abouti au départ des entraîneuses Raphaëlle Tervel et Sandrine Mariot un an avant la fin de leur contrat. « On a vécu une année pas facile au niveau du staff, estime Gérard Le Saint. Quand ça ne va pas, il faut changer.

offbeat.title: Virus Toscana a Morrovalle: accertato un caso. Il Comune invita alla prevenzione
offbeat.summary: Un caso accertato di infezione da virus Toscana nel territorio di Morrovalle, il Comune, per limitare la proliferazione dei pappataci, invita la cittadinanza a osservare delle buone pratiche. A segnalare il caso al Comune è stata l’Azienda sanitaria territoriale di Macerata. I l virus Toscana può essere trasmesso dalla puntura dei pappataci, piccoli insetti ematofagi attivi soprattutto nelle ore crepuscolari e notturne durante i mesi caldi e, in una piccola parte delle persone infette, può causare malattie gravi come meningiti e meningo-encefaliti.

offbeat.title: Kerry football captain Paul Geaney: ‘I don’t think I’d be here if the rules didn’t change’
offbeat.summary: M ost things get easier when you’re preparing for your eighth All-Ireland final, and for Kerry captain Paul Geaney that includes knowing how to switch off from football completely. Having three young kids at home helps in that regard. At the close of his 16th season with Kerry, Geaney’s All-Ireland final experience began with the 2014 win over Donegal and included the 2019 replay defeat to Dublin. Victory over Mayo on Sunday would bring his fourth winner’s medal in all, having also won a first All-Ireland club title with Dingle at the start of this year. “I probably got overexcited in the earlier years with big games,” Geaney says of this week’s final countdown.

offbeat.title: Minister will meet Law Society over legal aid dispute
offbeat.summary: Minister for Justice Jim O'Callaghan has said he will meet the Law Society to discuss the dispute over the new legal aid payments system, which has led to widespread disruption in criminal courts. Mr O'Callaghan rejected suggestions that he had been intransigent on the issue and said the first request he got for a meeting from the Law Society since the system was introduced was last night. Speaking on RTÉ's Morning Ireland, the minister said he had no difficulty meeting the Law Society and was sure there were "some areas in terms of where they can make points to me that I will accept and engage with them".

offbeat.title: Sadie Sink Keeps Mystery Of 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' Role & Reveals "I Am Not Aunt May"
offbeat.summary: Sadie Sink ‘s role in Spider-Man : Brand New Day remains a mystery ahead of the film’s premiere. A new video teased Sink revealing three things about her character in the Sony Pictures production, but left audiences with the same doubts. “Since the trailer dropped, I’ve seen so many theories about who I’m playing,” Sink said in the Instagram clip. “To match your incredible energy, I’ve decided to give you three exclusive, confirmed answers right now.” Starting off the video, Sink said, “I can confirm I am not Spider-Man.” She continued to joke and said, “I am not Aunt May,” the character that Marisa Tomei played and died in 2021’s Spider-Man: No Way Home .

offbeat.title: Una casta que se juzga a sí misma
offbeat.summary: El Consejo General del Poder Judicial archivará las cinco denuncias contra el juez Juan Carlos Peinado, instructor del caso Begoña Gómez, tras la propuesta de Ricardo Conde. El órgano judicial pospuso la decisión final por falta de consenso interno. La polémica surgió por un auto de Peinado que retiró el pasaporte a Begoña Gómez y sugirió que sus escoltas podrían facilitar una fuga.

offbeat.title: US House passes $1.15 trillion military bill expanding Israel cooperation
offbeat.summary: The U.S. House narrowly passed a $1.15 trillion military spending bill on Wednesday by a 216-212 vote, expanding military technology cooperation with Israel. Six Democrats joined Republicans in support while seven Republicans opposed it. The measure now faces uncertain prospects in the Senate.
offbeat.trend: us house national defense authorization act

offbeat.title: Trambestuurder na botsing uit het ziekenhuis: 'Hij was in shock, dat is niet het beste moment iemand te spreken'
offbeat.summary: De RET heeft nog steeds geen idee wat de oorzaak is van de trambotsing van woensdag. De twee zwaar beschadigde trams zijn naar een remise gesleept en worden grondig onderzocht. De bestuurder van de tram die de botsing veroorzaakte, is inmiddels weer thuis. De RET hoopt hem vandaag of morgen te spreken. De twee trams zijn woensdag aan het begin van de avond van de Erasmusbrug weggehaald. "Ze staan in de remise en ze worden helemaal uit elkaar gehaald", zegt RET-directeur Linda Boot bij Peter & Milou op Radio Rijnmond.

offbeat.title: Karine Ferri maman : elle partage une rare et adorable photo de sa petite dernière, Sasha, 3 ans, qui a bien grandi
offbeat.summary: Karine Ferri shared a rare photo of her 3-year-old daughter Sasha on Instagram on July 23, showing the toddler in a superhero mask. The image captures Sasha in a playful moment with her family in Brittany. Ferri, known for her TV work, often highlights her family life online.

offbeat.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling are joined by her teenage daughter, Georgina, to support Prince William at a charity polo day
offbeat.summary: From their first meeting to their wedding day, family has been at the heart of Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling's royal romance. So it is of no surprise their three daughters continue to play such an important part in their lives now that they're married. Last week, Harriet and Peter were joined by her daughter, Georgina, as they made a low-key appearance at the DMMI Royal Charity Polo Cup at Guards Polo Club, Windsor.

offbeat.title: Trump's nuclear deal with Saudis jettisons longstanding US demands
offbeat.summary: Signing a nuclear pact in the Middle East is a bold move that has drawn criticism in the US and in Israel. Image source, EPA By Daniel Bush Washington Updated 54 minutes ago The Trump administration's nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia reversed a years-long stance toward a key Middle East ally. Past US presidents insisted that Saudi Arabia normalise relations with Israel in exchange for receiving American nuclear technology for civilian energy programmes.

offbeat.title: Iran war updates: US says new strikes under way; Trump threatens bridges
offbeat.summary: US strikes on Iran are underway as of July 22, 2026, with Jordan intercepting multiple Iranian missiles targeting Gulf infrastructure. President Trump warned Iran of further strikes on bridges if attacks continue. The Pentagon confirmed expanded operations amid rising regional tensions.

offbeat.title: OKDIARIO localiza a Alba, la otra hija imputada de Zapatero, tras la confesión de ‘Julito’ Martínez
offbeat.summary: OKDIARIO ha localizado este miércoles a Alba Zapatero Espinosa, la hija menor de José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero, al día siguiente de que 'Julito' Martínez, el presunto testaferro de su padre, confesara ante el juez Calama, en la Audiencia Nacional, haber estado pagándoles sin trabajar durante tres años como parte de la comisión al expresidente por el rescate de Plus Ultra.

Pick your squad NOW For FPL managers who are returning to Fantasy Premier League , there is now be an option to get help when picking your initial squad through the website. The violence has stirred public anger and galvanised India's opposition, posing a challenge for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government. Modi has not commented directly on the protests or engaged with the protesters, but on Thursday, he posted a statement on X that is being seen as an attempt to reach out to students who have been frustrated with repeated exam paper leaks . "Nothing is more important than the welfare and future of our youth," he wrote. "We have decided to set up fast-track courts to ensure swift and stringent punishment for those involved in paper leaks...

offbeat.title: Le Confederazioni artigiane al Ministro Urso: in Dpcm Automotive mini-contratti di sviluppo siano accessibili alle piccole imprese
offbeat.summary: Comunicati stampa 23 Luglio 2026 · AUTOMOTIVE Confartigianato Meccanica e Subfornitura, CNA Meccanica e Casartigiani Meccanica e Impianti hanno scritto al ministro delle Imprese e del Made in Italy, Adolfo Urso, in merito all’attuazione del DPCM Automotive. Le tre Confederazioni valutano positivamente lo stanziamento di 1,35 miliardi di euro per il periodo 2026-2030 e la destinazione del 70% delle risorse al sostegno della filiera, ma chiedono che i Mini-contratti di sviluppo siano realmente accessibili alle micro e piccole imprese.

politics.title: Burnham acting like he's still mayor, says Badenoch
politics.summary: The Tory leader says the new prime minister needs to "lift his sights" to fix broader issues with the UK. Kemi Badenoch has accused Andy Burnham of governing like he is still the mayor of Greater Manchester, with a "spending spree" of early promises. The Conservative leader said the new prime minister had failed to explain how a series of measures announced during his first days in office could be paid for. Burnham's early policies include restoring a £2 cap on bus fares in England and cutting VAT on household electricity bills. Labour defended his announcements, adding he was "bringing back hope after Kemi Badenoch's Tory Party nearly broke Britain".

politics.title: Inquiry into Farage poster row at anti-racism show
politics.summary: Investigation has begun after row started over posters that displayed Nigel Farage's face. An investigation has been launched after claims Reform UK councillors attempted to have a music event shut down due to posters featuring the face of party leader Nigel Farage. Police and Wakefield Council confirmed they were examining reports of an incident at the Love Music Hate Racism event at Wakefield Exchange (WX) on Saturday. Organisers said they were told by two councillors to "remove any posters and banners that named Farage or the event would be stopped".

breaking.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
breaking.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords. Figure caption, Watch: What we know about the US-Saudi nuclear deal By Robert Greenall Updated 19 minutes ago The landmark nuclear deal between the US and Saudi Arabia is dependent on Riyadh joining the Abraham Accords recognising the State of Israel, President Donald Trump has said. "The Civil Nuclear Deal (There will be no enrichment of material!)... which pertains only to non-military use... will be approved, but is totally subject to Saudi Arabia joining the very respected and successful Abraham Accords," Trump said in a post on Truth Social.

breaking.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
breaking.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region. About 12,000 people have been evacuated from the south-west of France and authorities are moving 8,800 others as wildfires spread in the Gironde region. The fire brigade says about 3,100 hectares (7,660 acres) of land have already been destroyed around the Bay of Arcachon. Many of those who had to leave the area overnight were visitors to local campsites on the Lège-Cap-Ferret peninsula and the latest evacuations also involved campsites as a precaution. Wildfires have also broken out in Spain and Italy in recent days.

breaking.title: Why I Sought Out a Taliban Commander I Had Fought
breaking.summary: First as a Marine and then as a journalist, I spent years tied to Afghanistan. I returned one last time to speak to a former enemy in search of answers, and perhaps closure.

tech.title: Ford picks Apple Maps for its next EV platform and updated BlueCruise
tech.summary: Ford will embed Apple Maps into its new Universal Electric Vehicle Platform starting with a $30,000 midsize pickup truck launching in 2027. The integration will provide real-time traffic, natural language directions, and intelligent EV routing without requiring an iPhone. Ford also announced a next-generation BlueCruise system using Apple Maps data for hands-free highway driving.

tech.title: Amazon gaming boss predicts future where players no longer need consoles
tech.summary: Jeff Gattis said the rising cost of gaming tech is likely to mean more people will stream their games online. Amazon's head of gaming Jeff Gattis has told the BBC he believes the rising cost of tech means people will turn to streaming games online rather than buying new consoles. He said the tech has developed a lot in recent years, making it more viable than it used to be - but accepted some people will still buy their own hardware. While cloud gaming has long been billed as the future of video games, previous efforts have failed to gain widespread adoption - leading to the high-profile closure of Google Stadia in 2023.

tech.title: How to Use ChatGPT and Gemini Prompts to Find Out What They Know About You
tech.summary: It can be unsettling what Gemini and ChatGPT have figured out about you and how easily your privacy can be punctured. Here’s how to find out.

sports.title: Arsenal sign Greek forward Tzolis for £34m
sports.summary: Arsenal sign "extremely versatile attacking player" Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m. Arsenal have signed "extremely versatile attacking player" Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m. The 24-year-old Greece international has joined the Premier League champions on what they describe as a "long-term contract". Tzolis scored 43 goals and provided 45 assists in 108 appearances for Club Brugge. He joins Arsenal after the departure of Belgium forward Leandro Trossard to Besiktas earlier this month "Christos naturally operates on the left but is comfortable across the front line," said Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta.

sports.title: Codina on why she joined West Ham project
sports.summary: Laia Codina won trophies and found a "new family" during her three-year spell at Arsenal - but she was ready for a change with West Ham. Spain defender Codina said the decision to join West Ham was down to "many reasons" but the influence of Italian boss Guarino, who joined in December, was the biggest. "I remember having my first conversation with Rita. It was at the beginning of everything. I had my agent next to me and I was like 'wow'," said Codina. "The feeling that I got in this meeting is what I want in my future; it is what I want for my next steps. This was probably the main reason. "She was honest with me on everything - what she wants from me and what she wants from the team.

sports.title: Australia open to playing Test against England in India
sports.summary: Cricket Australia is open to playing a Test match against England in India to boost interest in the format. The sides are set to meet in a one-off Test at Melbourne Cricket Ground in March 2027 for the Ashes’ 150th anniversary. Any such fixture would require agreement from the ECB and BCCI.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: Long-term exposure to road traffic noise is associated with a higher risk of Parkinson’s disease, the biggest study of its kind has found. Parkinson’s disease is a progressive disorder in which parts of the brain become damaged over time, affecting movement and balance. Existing research has found potential biological pathways that link noise exposure to Parkinson’s disease, largely due to stress responses and disrupted sleep. The researchers modelled noise exposure at the most and least exposed exterior of the residence of each participant and calculated the difference in noise levels.

health.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
health.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

health.title: ‘Why do I feel crappy?’: women are learning about their luteal phases - and Maha is weaponizing it
health.summary: E mily Rae Detrick, a health coach, wants women to be more in touch with their menstrual cycle in its entirety. This, she said on an October episode of Culture Apothecary with Alex Clark, a podcast popular among “Make America Healthy Again” (Maha) adherents, is “a way that you honor God and the way we were created”. It also serves her self-assigned mission to help “make America fertile again”. In the episode and on social media, Detrick speaks at length about the luteal phase, the 14-ish days between ovulation and menstruation when women are more likely to experience irritability, bloating and food cravings.

entertainment.title: Actress Jaime Winstone joins Strictly line-up
entertainment.summary: Winstone, known for EasteEnders and Made in Dagenham, is the eighth celebrity to be confirmed. Actress Jaime Winstone, known for roles in Made in Dagenham and EastEnders, has joined the line-up for Strictly Come Dancing 2026. She is the eighth celebrity to be confirmed for this year's series, joining stars including Delta Goodrem, Lacey Turner and Dani Dyer. Winstone, who won acclaim for her portrayal of Barbara Windsor in the BBC biopic Babs, said she was "so excited" to be joining the dance competition. The actress said in a statement she was "no stranger to a dance floor", but added that ballroom is "a whole new world for me".

entertainment.title: Biennale Chief Slams EU for Withdrawing Funding Over Russia’s Presence at Art Exhibition During Film Festival Press Conference: ‘They Are Abandoning Us’
entertainment.summary: Venice Biennale chairman Pietrangelo Buttafuoco slammed the European Union at the film festival press conference on Thursday for withdrawing a €2 million ($2.3 million) grant in response to Russia’s participation in the Biennale’s arts exhibition this year. It was the first time the country has returned to the event since the invasion of Ukraine in 2022. In an impassioned speech ahead of the announcement of the Venice Film Festival lineup, Buttafuoco said he would not bow to EU pressure since this would undermine “the autonomy and freedom of expression” of the arts foundation that operates across six artistic sectors: art, architecture, cinema, dance, music and theater.

crisis.title: Help for electricity bills as crude oil nears $100
crisis.summary: The States of Guernsey said it would give Alderney Electricity £200,000 to offset islanders' bills. Jeannie Cameron, who chairs the committee, said the funds would be applied directly to customers' bills. She said: "The recent rise in global oil prices has the potential to place additional financial pressure on households and businesses at a time when many are already managing increased costs. "This temporary measure provides a level of protection against exceptional fuel price increases while ensuring that public funds are only used where they are genuinely needed." Cameron said unlike its sister islands Guernsey and Jersey, Alderney did not have cable supplying electricity from France.

crisis.title: Diesel Crisis Puts Poor Farmers Around the World at Risk
crisis.summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has limited the shipment of diesel, depriving farmers of fuel for irrigation pumps and threatening the food supply.

facts.title: Illegal waste investigation sees £275k forfeited
facts.summary: The investigation spans Herefordshire, Worcestershire and Shropshire, police say. Three businesses that are being investigated by police who are looking into illegal waste activity have forfeited a total of more than £275,000. West Mercia Police said additional crimes had been identified in its investigation across Herefordshire, Worcestershire and Shropshire. The force added that more assets were under review and a money laundering investigation was still active. It comes after two men were arrested at an address in Drakes Broughton, Worcestershire, in January. Six firearms were seized at that location, along with about £18,000 in cash.

facts.title: Should Travelers Give Up on Summer in Western Europe Because of the Heat?
facts.summary: A favorite vacation option may be at risk because of rising temperatures. Even those sticking with their summer plans agree: More air conditioning would help.
